description_long: This is a single right-handed glove designed for urban use, featuring a predominantly gray fabric body with a textured, grippy black palm and finger area. The glove has a distinctive teal blue padded section at the wrist, likely for added comfort or protection. The back of the glove shows a subtle mesh-like pattern, enhancing breathability and flexibility. The fingers are short, ending before the knuckles, making it a fingerless glove suitable for activities requiring dexterity, such as cycling or weightlifting. The material appears to be a combination of synthetic fabric and rubber, providing both durability and grip. There are no visible logos, closures, or reflective elements on the glove.
description: A gray and black fingerless glove with a teal padded wrist, made of synthetic fabric and rubber, designed for grip and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open finger slots and the teal padded wrist section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black grippy palm and mesh-like back pattern.
description_view_2: Angled rear view emphasizing the teal wrist pad and the smooth gray fabric.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the full gray fabric surface and the teal wrist pad.
